overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player ascending a concrete stairwell from an underground area into a neon-lit futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The scene transitions from enclosed concrete architecture to an open pedestrian area with palm trees, illuminated benches, and scattered NPCs under a darkening sky with vibrant purple and cyan neon lighting.

events.description: blue neon light from the exit becomes visible at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the exit at the top

entered.detail: enclosed concrete walls and steps with artificial lighting
continuous metal railing along the left wall
rectangular fluorescent lights mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a narrow concrete stairwell with artificial lighting. The walls are plain concrete with a metal handrail on the left, and a blue glow from the exit becomes visible as the player approaches the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell landing with vendor and digital displays

events.description: reaching the upper landing where a vendor cart is positioned on the left
large digital billboard displaying 'HOLT' becomes visible overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing up the final flight of stairs past a vendor cart on the left

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside a cart with glowing blue merchandise display

entered.detail: small cart with glowing blue lights and merchandise
large overhead screen displaying political advertisement with man's face
large vertical screen showing ocean imagery and text

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the upper landing where a vendor stands beside a glowing cart. A large digital billboard displaying 'HOLT' hangs overhead, and a massive screen on the right wall shows ocean imagery. The space opens up as the player approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with palm trees and neon lighting

events.description: exiting the stairwell into the open plaza with visible dusk sky
ambient lighting shifts from enclosed artificial to open dusk with neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking out of the stairwell into the open plaza and looking around at the surroundings

notable_agents.action: person walking away from the camera into the plaza

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk sky
dark modern building with illuminated windows
small red-roofed food stand with interior lighting
raised highway structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: The player exits the stairwell into a wide-open futuristic plaza at dusk. Palm trees and modern buildings surround the area, with purple neon light pillars glowing in the distance. A red food kiosk stands in the center as the player emerges into the neon-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with illuminated seating and futuristic architecture

events.description: turning right to walk along the plaza benches
passing by NPCs seated on illuminated benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza observing the surroundings and passing seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman sitting on an illuminated bench looking at her phone
person in red jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: modern benches with integrated white LED lighting underneath
large pile of garbage bags on the left side of the plaza
large building with curved facade and horizontal lines
large digital displays showing advertisements on building walls

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the open plaza, passing modern benches with integrated lighting where NPCs are seated. The camera turns right, revealing more of the futuristic architecture including a curved building and large digital advertising screens. Palm trees line the walkway as the player continues exploring the neon-lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic concrete stairwell into a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic plaza at dusk. It begins with an ascent up narrow concrete stairs guided by a metal handrail, moving toward a distant blue glow at the top of the flight. As the player reaches the upper landing, the space expands to reveal a vendor with a glowing cart beneath a large HOLT billboard and a massive screen displaying ocean imagery. The scene then opens completely as the camera exits the stairwell into a wide plaza filled with palm trees, purple neon light pillars, and a central red food kiosk. Finally, the movement continues through the open urban environment, passing illuminated benches and NPCs before turning right to reveal curved futuristic architecture and towering digital advertising screens.
